title: Actor Path Substitution
claim: An audit exercised only the model/proposer surface, observed that direct execution is denied, and concluded that the authorized operator execution path does not exist.

observed_evidence.detail: The model/proposer surface was probed against the protected executor and correctly returned DENY (BLOCKED_LIVE_AUTHORITY_REQUIRED).
Policy assigns propose-only authority to the proposer and execute-after-approval authority to a distinct authorized operator via a separate entrypoint.

missing_evidence.detail: The authorized operator's actual route was never exercised; the operator-path result is not established.
No evidence establishes that the proposer path and the operator path are equivalent for the conclusion being made.

required_action: Exercise the claimed actor's authorized path independently (operator authorization and, where execution is claimed, operator execution to an independently read-back postcondition), or independently establish actor-path equivalence. Scope every audit conclusion to the actor paths actually observed. Do not grant the proposer operator authority.
notes: REPRESENTATIVE_EXAMPLE — NOT_A_VERIFIED_HISTORICAL_INCIDENT. No commit id, path, timestamp, digest, actor role, or production receipt is asserted. The proposer denial is expected and may demonstrate correct authority separation; the defect is the unsupported transfer of the proposer result to the untested operator path. The operator path is NOT_ESTABLISHED — neither proven missing nor proven reachable.
